evalAfter: (async () => { const r={errs:[]}; window.addEventListener('error',e=>r.errs.push(e.message)); const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||'')); if(btn)btn.click(); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,3000)); try{MOS.nav('catalogo');}catch(e){} await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,4500)); try{ MOS.abrirModalPrecioCurvas('IDPRO0000001'); }catch(e){ r.throwDirecto=e.message; } await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,1500)); r.modalAbrio=!!document.getElementById('pcCurvasModal'); r.costo=(document.querySelector('#pcCurvasModal .mono.grow')||{}).textContent; r.margenDisabled=(document.getElementById('pcMargen')||{}).disabled; return r; })()
